name: Enigma – Computer Science Club
summary: The Official Coding and Software Development Club of Mahindra University.
description: Enigma is dedicated to fostering a strong culture of competitive coding, open-source contribution, and software engineering. We organize weekly programming contests, hackathons, and software development workshops. Whether you are a beginner writing your first Hello World or an experienced developer building complex systems, Enigma provides the resources and community to help you grow.

name: Entrepreneurship & Innovation Cell (EIC)
summary: Fostering entrepreneurial mindsets, startup incubation, and business innovation.
description: EIC is the premier student body driving innovation, venture creation, and startup incubation at Mahindra University. We empower student founders with mentorship, investor networking, pitch competitions, and startup workshops to transform bold ideas into scalable businesses.

name: TEDx Mahindra University
summary: Independently organized TED event spreading ideas, inspiration, and impactful talks.
description: TEDx Mahindra University brings together visionary thinkers, innovators, artists, and leaders to share ideas worth spreading. Our team curates premier annual conferences, speaker workshops, and thought-provoking storytelling sessions across diverse disciplines.

name: MasterShot Filmmaking Club
summary: The Cinema, Videography, and Short Film Production Guild.
description: MasterShot is the official cinema and filmmaking guild at Mahindra University. We bring together directors, cinematographers, scriptwriters, video editors, and actors to produce short films, documentaries, campus vlogs, and cinematic visual stories.

name: Econova
summary: The Economics, Market Research, and Finance Guild.
description: Econova is the student economics society dedicated to exploring global financial markets, economic policy, market research, and investment analysis. We host economic debriefs, stock simulation games, policy debates, and analytical research projects.

name: AI Club
summary: The Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Student Community.
description: AI Club brings together students passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, computer vision, and LLMs. We conduct hands-on research, model training workshops, guest lectures, and AI hackathons to solve real-world problems.

name: C-Cube-E Club
summary: Creative Coding, Computers, and Electronics Innovation.
description: C-Cube-E (Creative Coding & Electronics) focuses on blending computational arts, hardware hacking, physical computing, and interactive electronic installations. We hold tinkering nights, hardware design jams, and creative engineering workshops.

name: Literary Society – The Erudite Club
summary: Public Speaking, Debating, Creative Writing, and Literary Arts.
description: The Erudite Club is the literary and debate guild at Mahindra University. We hold weekly practice debates, creative writing circles, poetry slams, and literary discussions. Designed to build articulate communication and intellectual discourse.

name: Outreach & Social Impact Club
summary: Community service, social welfare, volunteering, and impact initiatives.
description: Outreach & Social Impact Club drives social responsibility projects, blood donation drives, educational mentoring for underprivileged children, and sustainability campaigns across local communities.

name: SAE BAJA Division
summary: Off-road vehicle design, fabrication, and national BAJA racing competitions.
description: SAE BAJA Division designs, builds, and races all-terrain vehicle (ATV) prototypes for national SAE BAJA competitions. Members get hands-on experience with CAD modeling, chassis fabrication, powertrain tuning, and vehicle dynamics.

name: Echo – MU Monthly Newspaper
summary: The Official Campus Newspaper and Journalism Guild.
description: Echo is the student-run official campus newspaper of Mahindra University, reporting on campus affairs, student achievements, opinion pieces, culture, and investigative journalism.

name: Electronics & IoT Club (Lincoln Labs)
summary: The Robotics, IoT, and Hardware Engineering Guild.
description: Lincoln Labs brings together students interested in microcontrollers, embedded systems, sensors, Arduino, Raspberry Pi, and Internet of Things engineering.

name: Model United Nations (MU MUN)
summary: Diplomacy, international debate, resolution writing, and MUN conferences.
description: MU MUN trains students in diplomacy, international relations, caucus debate, and UN committee simulation. Members represent Mahindra University at premier national MUN conferences.

name: Qubit Club
summary: Introducing students to quantum computing through workshops, hackathons, and research.
description: Qubit Club is dedicated to quantum algorithms, Qiskit, cloud quantum computing platforms, and emerging quantum technology research.

name: SAE Aero Division
summary: Aircraft design, RC plane fabrication, and Design-Build-Fly competitions.
description: SAE Aero Division focuses on aeronautics, aerodynamic testing, unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) design, and competing in international SAE Aero Design competitions.

name: Roboverse – Robotics Club
summary: Autonomous robots, mechanical automation, and robotics competitions.
description: Roboverse builds autonomous ground robots, combat bots, and mechanical automation projects for national robotics expos and hackathons.

name: Synolo – Music Club
summary: Vocalists, instrumentalists, band jams, and festival live performances.
description: Synolo brings together campus musicians, singers, songwriters, and bands to jam, record music, and perform at major university cultural events.

name: Dance Club – 8 Counts
summary: Choreography, hip-hop, contemporary, and classical dance performances.
description: 8 Counts is the dance squad of Mahindra University, hosting dance workshops, flash mobs, and competing in inter-college dance face-offs.

name: Aether & AIRO Committees
summary: Aeronautics, UAV flight dynamics, and aerospace engineering.
description: Aether & AIRO focus on flight simulation, drone assembly, aerodynamics, and aerospace technology research.

name: Cyber Security Club (Secret Garden)
summary: Ethical hacking, network security, CTF challenges, and cyber defense.
description: Secret Garden explores ethical hacking, vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, cryptography, and competing in Capture The Flag (CTF) tournaments.

name: AeiForia – The Sustainability Club
summary: Sustainability and green campus initiatives.
description: AeiForia – The Sustainability Club is dedicated to sustainability and green campus initiatives. We organize regular student activities, collaborative projects, and skill-building sessions.

name: AIESEC at Mahindra University

description: AIESEC at Mahindra University is dedicated to global youth leadership and exchange programs. We organize regular student activities, collaborative projects, and skill-building sessions.
